title: Austin Permits Sample Dashboard
description: Curated sample dashboard for Austin building permits with month, ZIP, type, and source caveats.
prompt: Show Austin building permits by month and ZIP code.

sources.queryMethod: Curated gallery sample rendered from a validated CanvasDocument fixture.
caveats: Austin live monthly aggregation remains blocked until a source-owned month expression is safely verified.
Sample mode may not represent complete public records.

props.heading: Austin permit activity is shown as sample-backed aggregate context.
props.text: This curated example keeps the Austin dashboard honest about sample fallback while still demonstrating month, type, ZIP, and source/method blocks.
bullets: No live Austin monthly aggregation is promoted yet.
The dashboard avoids raw personal fields.
Every block is governed CanvasDocument JSON.

props.label: Sample permits
props.helperText: Rows in the local fallback sample

props.title: ZIP-level permit context
props.legend: Bubble size reflects sample permit count.
props.note: ZIP aggregation is approximate and not parcel-level analysis.

props.title: Sample permit aggregates
props.caption: Aggregate-safe table excerpt for the curated gallery.

attribution.queryMethod: Curated gallery sample rendered from a validated CanvasDocument fixture.

props.methodology: The gallery fixture is checked in as validated CanvasDocument JSON and rendered only through the allowlisted block registry.
